label: Publicly Published News Article
description: News content already publicly available with no PII
safety_reason: No private identifiers. Content is intentionally public. No confidentiality expectation.

label: Open Source License File
description: MIT, Apache, GPL license text files
safety_reason: Explicitly public, no proprietary content, no identifiers.

label: Public API Response (Non-PII)
description: Weather data, stock prices, exchange rates — no user data
safety_reason: Aggregated, anonymized, and publicly available data.

label: Properly Anonymized Dataset
description: Data with all 18 HIPAA identifiers removed and k-anonymity applied
safety_reason: Re-identification risk is mathematically bounded. Compliant with HIPAA Safe Harbor.

label: Aggregated Statistical Summary
description: Count totals, averages, and percentages — no row-level records
safety_reason: No individual can be identified from aggregate statistics alone.

label: Properly Salted Password Hash (bcrypt/Argon2)
description: Irreversibly hashed passwords using modern KDF
safety_reason: Hash is computationally infeasible to reverse with proper salt and work factor.

label: AES-256-GCM Encrypted Bundle
description: Properly encrypted data with authenticated encryption
safety_reason: Ciphertext reveals no plaintext without key. GCM provides integrity assurance.

label: Application Performance Metric Log (No PII)
description: CPU/memory/response time metrics without user identifiers
safety_reason: System telemetry with no user data, no IP addresses, no session tokens.

label: Sanitized Error Log
description: Application error logs with PII/credentials stripped
safety_reason: Post-sanitization: no credentials, no user IDs, no IP addresses remain.

label: Synthetic Test Dataset
description: Programmatically generated fake PII for testing — no real individuals
safety_reason: Fabricated data. No real individuals. No linkage to real records.

label: Non-Sensitive Application Config (No Secrets)
description: Config files with only feature flags, timeout values, UI settings
safety_reason: No credentials, no IP addresses, no internal paths. Pure behavioral config.

label: Public Certificate (.crt / .pub)
description: Public half of a key pair — intended to be distributed
safety_reason: Public keys are designed to be shared. No cryptographic secret is revealed.

label: Public Technical Documentation / README
description: Open-source project docs, API usage guides with no secrets
safety_reason: Intended for public consumption. No proprietary or personal content.

label: Properly Redacted Classified Document
description: Document with classified sections fully blacked out per NSA/NIST standards
safety_reason: Classified content is irrecoverable if redaction is done at binary level, not just visual.

label: Tokenized Payment Data (PCI DSS Compliant)
description: Card PANs replaced with non-reversible tokens by a certified vault
safety_reason: Token has no mathematical relationship to original PAN. Vault is isolated.
